title: Atmospheric Paintings
description: Pixelized Masterpieces available for your square eyes.
body:
This mod was created out of lust for some real life beauty to enter Minecraft.
Mod adds over 40 new paintings created by some unfortunately long gone legends like Leonardo da Vinci.

Also at [CURSEFORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jess-painting-pack)

The selection of painting will increase as the time goes on but, if you have a favourite piece feel free to suggest it!

![imag pre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OWfnVQX4/images/0d9647ceb8ff8be2b2ba85a64d51b33e6302abe8.png)
